Class ObservableViewModel<T>

java.lang.Object
task.trak.app.client.gui.viewmodel.ObservableViewModel<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, ViewModel<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProjectViewModel, SprintViewModel, TaskViewModel, UserViewModel
public abstract class ObservableViewModel<T> extends Object implements ViewModel<T>, Serializable
Abstract base for all ViewModels. Implements ViewModel and Serializable. Handles listener management and serialization to .cache/ directory.
See Also:
